basics.name: Eric Bartos
basics.label: Senior Infrastructure Architect
basics.summary: Senior Infrastructure Architect with 8+ years designing and managing enterprise infrastructure supporting 300+ users across 7 locations. Expert in VMware virtualization (29 hosts, 350+ VMs in production), Palo Alto security (18 devices in production), and multi-site network architecture. Proven track record managing $5-8M technology portfolios with 99.9%+ uptime and leading $4M+ infrastructure projects. Experienced in remote infrastructure management and distributed team collaboration.

work.name: Wisconsin Public Radio

positions.title: Senior Infrastructure Architect (Broadcast Network Integration Engineer)

highlights: Lead enterprise infrastructure architecture supporting 300+ employees across 7 locations with $5M+ technology portfolio
Architect and manage 29-host VMware environment with 350+ VMs across primary, DR, and remote sites
Design enterprise security with 18 Palo Alto firewalls in 9 HA pairs and centralized Panorama management
Implement multi-site network with 100G backbone connectivity and EVPN/VXLAN overlay architecture
Manage enterprise storage infrastructure including 300TB+ capacity across multiple iSCSI/NFS systems

work.name: Nexcess.net
highlights: Contributed to physical buildout of new datacenter facility across two summers, laying infrastructure before facility opened
Led structured cabling, PDU configuration, and physical plant preparation for multi-hall datacenter expansion
Performed rack and stack, server builds, Linux provisioning, and pre-configuration of production systems

work.name: Michigan Technological University

positions.title: Technical Operations Manager — WMTU 91.9 FM & Student Telecom

highlights: Led campus radio station broadcast infrastructure design and technical operations management
Implemented audio over IP networking solutions and enterprise telecommunications systems
Managed technical staff and training programs

projects.name: Enterprise Storage Migration
projects.description: Led Dell to IXSystems migration with zero downtime for 300+ users

projects.name: DR Site Implementation
projects.description: Currently leading complete disaster recovery facility design and buildout

projects.name: VMware Infrastructure Modernization
projects.description: Executed 12-host hardware refresh and vSphere upgrade

projects.name: Network Architecture Overhaul
projects.description: Designed migration to Cisco Nexus with NDFC and EVPN/VXLAN

projects.name: Complete Datacenter Buildout
projects.description: Led initial enterprise datacenter design, layout, and implementation

courses: Transferred to Michigan Technological University, Spring 2013
